items.title: Improving Deep Agents with harness engineering
items.content:
TLDR: Our coding agent went from Top 30 to Top 5 on Terminal Bench 2.0. We only changed the harness. Here’s our approach to harness engineering (teaser: self-verification & tracing help a lot).

The Goal of Harness Engineering

The goal of a harness is to mold the

items.summary_cn: 通过改进harness，编码Agent在Terminal Bench 2.0上的排名从前30提升到前5。重点是自验证和追踪。

items.title: OpenClaw
items.content: OpenClaw is a personal AI assistant that connects your messaging apps to local AI coding agents, all running on your own device.
items.summary_cn: OpenClaw是一个个人AI助手，可将消息应用程序连接到本地AI编码代理，所有这些都在您自己的设备上运行。
items.next_action: 评估OpenClaw在实际场景的应用

items.title: Fine-tuning open LLM judges to outperform GPT-5.2
items.content: Fine-tuned open-source LLM judges can outperform GPT-5.2 at evaluating model outputs. Using Direct Preference Optimization on just 5,400 preference pairs, we trained GPT-OSS 120B to beat GPT-5.2 on human preference alignment—at 15x lower cost and 14x faster inference speeds.
items.summary_cn: 微调开源 LLM 评判模型，性能优于 GPT-5.2。
items.importance_reason: Together AI Blog / AI Models，基础分 89.8，个性化分 89.8，主线候选。
items.title_en: Fine-tuning open LLM judges to outperform GPT-5.2
items.summary_en: 微调开源 LLM 评判模型，性能优于 GPT-5.2。

items.title: New in Agent Builder: all new agent chat, file uploads + tool registry
items.content:
Today, we're expanding what you can do with LangSmith Agent Builder. It’s an big update built around a simple idea: working with an agent should feel like working with a teammate.

We rebuilt Agent Builder around this idea. There is now an always available agent (”
items.author: LangChain Accounts
items.summary_cn: LangSmith Agent Builder更新，重点围绕与Agent协作如与队友协作的理念，包括Agent聊天、文件上传和工具注册。
items.importance_reason: LangChain Blog / Agent Development，基础分 88.2，个性化分 88.2，主线候选。
items.title_en: Agent Builder Updates: New Agent Chat, File Uploads, and Tool Registry
items.summary_en: LangSmith's Agent Builder updates focus on enhancing agent collaboration with features like agent chat, file uploads, and a tool registry.

items.title: Consistency diffusion language models: Up to 14x faster inference without sacrificing quality
items.content: Standard diffusion language models can't use KV caching and need too many refinement steps to be practical. CDLM fixes both with a post-training recipe that enables exact block-wise KV caching and trajectory-consistent step reduction — delivering up to 14.5x latency improvements
items.summary_cn: 一致性扩散语言模型（CDLM）通过后训练方法，实现高达14倍的推理速度提升，且不牺牲质量。
key_points: Standard diffusion models lack KV caching.
items.why_it_matters: 显著提升推理速度和效率
items.next_action: 评估CDLM在实际应用中的性能
items.action_hint: 评估CDLM在实际应用中的性能
items.importance_reason: Together AI Blog / AI Optimization，基础分 88.2，个性化分 88.2，主线候选。
items.title_en: Consistency diffusion language models: Up to 14x faster inference without sacrificing quality
items.summary_en: Consistency diffusion language models (CDLM) achieve up to 14x faster inference speed through post-training methods, without sacrificing quality.
items.why_it_matters_en: Significantly improves inference speed and efficiency.
items.next_action_en: Evaluate CDLM's performance in real-world applications.

items.title: How we built Agent Builder’s memory system
items.content: A key part of Agent Builder is its memory system. In this article we cover our rationale for prioritizing a memory system, technical details of how we built it, learnings from building the memory system, what the memory system enables, and discuss future work.
items.author: LangChain Accounts
items.summary_cn: Agent Builder的记忆系统构建方法。
